profiles.name: Default
profiles.text: results-driven Learning & Development professional with strong experience in training design, facilitation, and performance coaching within corporate environments, currently serving as an Agency Trainer at AIG Singapore. unique blend of instructional expertise and commercial acumen, shaped by your background in customer experience, digital marketing, and mortgage advisory, including your time as a Meta Marketing Pro and multiple sales-focused roles. Known for developing structured learning programs, driving engagement, and aligning training initiatives with business goals, you have consistently demonstrated high performance—earning recognition such as TDCX Gold Trainer and Meta Blueprint certification—while maintaining a strong focus on learner impact, operational excellence, and continuous improvement.
